title: Statistical Process Control Course Outline
subtitle: A quality and compliance-focused workshop covering the practical requirements behind Statistical Process Control.
whyThisMatters: Statistical Process Control Course Outline helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to standards, process discipline, and continual improvement and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Understand key components of basic Control Charts
Product and process development team members

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
